preview_text:
The model favours Australia at 44%, with Paraguay at 25% and a draw at 31%. This makes Australia a clear favourite, though the underdog carries a meaningful one-in-four chance of victory.

The expected distribution suggests a competitive match leaning toward a decisive result. Australia's advantage is substantial but not overwhelming; the 44% win probability leaves room for either a Paraguay upset or a stalemate. A draw at roughly 31% remains plausible, indicating neither side is expected to dominate convincingly.

The model and sportsbook consensus diverge significantly. Books and Polymarket both assign Paraguay 43–44% and Australia only 28%, a spread of roughly 16 percentage points in Paraguay's favour compared to the model. The model sees Australia as substantially stronger; the market treats the sides as nearly even. The dashboard makes no claim about which assessment is correct.
